name: issue_search_synopsis_v0
description: Offline-only schema for evaluating canonical issue search synopsis documents.

fields.identifier: Synthetic issue key used for regression expectations.
fields.title: Issue title.
fields.child_count: Number of direct child issues in the synthetic graph.
fields.child_status_counts: Counts of direct children by status.
fields.active_children: Direct children in todo, in_progress, in_review, or blocked.
fields.latest_signal: Most recent final, consolidation, or decision-bearing signal.
fields.needs_decision: True when the issue is waiting on an explicit owner decision.
fields.true_blocked: True only for missing resource, permission, or external dependency blockers.
fields.superseded: True when the route is replaced by a newer route.
fields.needs_consolidation: True when a parent/control-room issue needs a current-state summary.
fields.search_text: Compact text intended for search indexing and rerank.

source_priority: ordinary comments only for explicit artifact/verdict/lifecycle fields
